controls.title: Ensure a separate partition for containers
controls.description: All Docker containers and their data should be stored on a separate partition from the host system.
controls.remediation: Configure Docker to use a separate partition for container storage.

controls.title: Ensure the container host has been Hardened
controls.description: The container host system should be hardened according to general security best practices.
controls.remediation: Follow host hardening best practices.

controls.title: Ensure Docker package is up to date
controls.description: Keep Docker package up to date to avoid security vulnerabilities.
controls.remediation: Update Docker package to latest stable version.

controls.title: Ensure aufs storage driver is not used
controls.description: aufs storage driver is not recommended for production use.
controls.remediation: Use overlay2 or another recommended storage driver.

controls.title: Ensure Content Trust for Docker is Enabled
controls.description: Content trust provides the ability to verify image integrity and authenticity.
controls.remediation: Export DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1 before running Docker commands.

controls.title: Ensure live restore is Enabled
controls.description: Live restore helps to keep containers running during Docker daemon downtime.
controls.remediation: Add "live-restore": true to /etc/docker/daemon.json.

controls.title: Ensure Userland Proxy is Disabled
controls.description: Userland proxy can be disabled to reduce attack surface.
controls.remediation: Add "userland-proxy": false to /etc/docker/daemon.json.

controls.title: Ensure daemon-wide custom seccomp profile is applied
controls.description: Default seccomp profile should be used or custom profile should be applied.
controls.remediation: Use default seccomp profile or apply custom profile.

controls.title: Ensure network traffic is restricted between containers
controls.description: By default, all containers on the same Docker network can communicate with each other.
controls.remediation: Configure network segmentation and use appropriate network drivers.

controls.title: Ensure the logging level is set to 'info'
controls.description: Setting appropriate logging level helps in monitoring and debugging.
controls.remediation: Configure appropriate logging driver in daemon.json.

controls.title: Ensure Docker is allowed to make changes to iptables
controls.description: Docker needs iptables access for networking functionality.
controls.remediation: Ensure Docker has appropriate iptables permissions.

controls.title: Ensure insecure registries are not used
controls.description: Insecure registries should not be used in production environments.
controls.remediation: Remove insecure registries from daemon.json configuration.

controls.title: Ensure aufs storage driver is not used
controls.description: Same as 1.3.1 - aufs is not recommended.
controls.remediation: Use overlay2 storage driver.

controls.title: Ensure Docker socket is not mounted inside any containers
controls.description: Docker socket should not be mounted inside containers as it provides full host access.
controls.remediation: Remove Docker socket mounts from container configurations.

controls.title: Ensure host's network namespace is not shared
controls.description: Containers should not share host's network namespace unless required.
controls.remediation: Use bridge networking mode instead of host networking.

controls.title: Ensure memory usage for container is limited
controls.description: Containers should have memory limits to prevent resource exhaustion.
controls.remediation: Set memory limits using --memory flag.

controls.title: Ensure CPU priority is set appropriately on container
controls.description: CPU limits should be set to prevent resource starvation.
controls.remediation: Set CPU limits using --cpu-shares flag.

controls.title: Ensure container's root filesystem is mounted as read-only
controls.description: Container filesystem should be read-only where possible.
controls.remediation: Use --read-only flag when running containers.

controls.title: Ensure incoming container traffic is bounded
controls.description: Container ports should be explicitly bound to specific interfaces.
controls.remediation: Bind ports to specific interfaces instead of 0.0.0.0.

controls.title: Ensure 'on-failure' container restart policy is set to '5'
controls.description: Container restart policy should be appropriately configured.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate restart policy using --restart flag.

controls.title: Ensure host's UID/GID mappings are not used
controls.description: Container should not use host's UID/GID mappings.
controls.remediation: Use user namespaces for container isolation.

controls.title: Ensure container is restricted from acquiring new privileges
controls.description: Containers should not be allowed to acquire new privileges.
controls.remediation: Use --no-new-privileges flag.

controls.title: Ensure sensitive host system directories are not mounted on containers
controls.description: Sensitive host directories should not be mounted in containers.
controls.remediation: Remove sensitive host directory mounts.

controls.title: Ensure sshd is not running within any container
controls.description: SSH daemon should not run inside containers.
controls.check_command: docker exec <container_id> ps aux | grep sshd
controls.remediation: Remove SSH daemon from container images.

controls.title: Ensure privileged containers are not used
controls.description: Privileged containers should be avoided.
controls.remediation: Remove --privileged flag from container configurations.

controls.title: Ensure sensitive files are not included within container images
controls.description: Container images should not contain sensitive files.
controls.remediation: Remove sensitive files from Docker images.

controls.title: Ensure 'docker' group membership is carefully managed
controls.description: Docker group membership should be restricted to trusted users.
controls.remediation: Restrict docker group membership to authorized users only.

controls.title: Ensure container health is checked at startup
controls.description: Container health checks should be configured.
controls.remediation: Add health checks to container configurations.

controls.title: Ensure containers use non-root user accounts
controls.description: Containers should run as non-root users.
controls.remediation: Configure containers to run as non-root users.

controls.title: Ensure containers are limited to essential capabilities
controls.description: Container capabilities should be limited to only what's needed.
controls.remediation: Drop unnecessary capabilities using --cap-drop.

controls.title: Ensure seccomp profile is applied, if needed
controls.description: Seccomp profiles should be applied to restrict system calls.
controls.remediation: Apply appropriate seccomp profiles.

controls.title: Ensure AppArmor profile is applied, if needed
controls.description: AppArmor profiles should be applied for additional security.
controls.remediation: Apply AppArmor profiles to containers.

controls.title: Ensure SELinux security options are set, if applicable
controls.description: SELinux should be configured for container security.
controls.remediation: Configure SELinux security options.

controls.title: Ensure user namespace support is not disabled
controls.description: User namespaces provide additional isolation.
controls.remediation: Enable user namespace support.

controls.title: Ensure daemon-wide custom seccomp profile is applied
controls.description: Custom seccomp profiles should be applied at daemon level.
controls.remediation: Configure custom seccomp profile in daemon.json.

controls.title: Ensure authentication is enabled for remote Docker daemon
controls.description: Remote Docker daemon access should be authenticated.
controls.remediation: Enable TLS authentication for remote access.

controls.title: Ensure authorization is enabled for remote Docker daemon
controls.description: Authorization plugins should be enabled for remote access.
controls.remediation: Configure authorization plugins.

controls.title: Ensure centralized and remote logging is enabled
controls.description: Container logs should be sent to centralized logging system.
controls.remediation: Configure centralized logging driver.

controls.title: Ensure containers are running only the required applications
controls.description: Containers should run minimal required applications.
controls.remediation: Remove unnecessary applications from containers.

controls.title: Ensure the latest Docker version is installed
controls.description: Latest Docker version should be installed.
controls.remediation: Update to latest Docker version.

controls.title: Ensure Docker commands are executed through a non-root user
controls.description: Docker commands should be executed by non-root users.
controls.remediation: Use non-root user for Docker operations.

controls.title: Ensure Docker socket file permissions are set to 660 or more restrictive
controls.description: Docker socket should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on Docker socket.

controls.title: Ensure Docker daemon configuration file permissions are set to 644 or more restrictive
controls.description: Docker daemon config should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on daemon configuration.

controls.title: Ensure Docker daemon service file permissions are set to 644 or more restrictive
controls.description: Docker service file should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on service file.

controls.title: Ensure Docker registry certificate file permissions are set to 444 or more restrictive
controls.description: Registry certificates should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on certificate files.

controls.title: Ensure TLS CA certificate file permissions are set to 444 or more restrictive
controls.description: TLS CA certificates should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on CA certificates.

controls.title: Ensure Docker server certificate file permissions are set to 444 or more restrictive
controls.description: Docker server certificates should have restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on server certificates.

controls.title: Ensure Docker server key file permissions are set to 400
controls.description: Docker server keys should have very restrictive permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on private key files.

controls.title: Ensure Docker socket ownership is set to root:docker
controls.description: Docker socket should be owned by root:docker group.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for Docker socket.

controls.title: Ensure Docker daemon configuration file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: Docker daemon config should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for daemon configuration.

controls.title: Ensure Docker daemon service file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: Docker service file should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for service file.

controls.title: Ensure Docker registry certificate file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: Registry certificates should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for certificate files.

controls.title: Ensure TLS CA certificate file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: TLS CA certificates should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for CA certificates.

controls.title: Ensure Docker server certificate file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: Docker server certificates should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for server certificates.

controls.title: Ensure Docker server key file ownership is set to root:root
controls.description: Docker server keys should be owned by root:root.
controls.remediation: Set correct ownership for private key files.

Section 5.title: Container Image and Build File Security

controls.title: Ensure Docker Content Trust (DCT) is enabled
controls.description: Docker Content Trust should be enabled for image verification.
controls.remediation: Export DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1.

controls.title: Ensure health check instructions are included in container images
controls.description: Container images should include health check instructions.
controls.remediation: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction in Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure minimal base images are used
controls.description: Use minimal base images to reduce attack surface.
controls.remediation: Use minimal base images like alpine or distroless.

controls.title: Ensure update instructions are not included in container images
controls.description: Update instructions should not be in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove update instructions from Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure sensitive information is not included in container images
controls.description: Sensitive information should not be in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove sensitive information from images.

controls.title: Ensure 'ADD' instruction is not used in container images
controls.description: Use COPY instead of ADD for better security.
controls.remediation: Replace ADD with COPY in Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'sudo' is not used in container images
controls.description: Avoid using sudo in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove sudo usage from Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'su' command is not used in container images
controls.description: Avoid using su command in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove su usage from Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure setuid and setgid permissions are removed in container images
controls.description: Remove unnecessary setuid/setgid permissions.
controls.remediation: Remove setuid/setgid permissions from images.

controls.title: Ensure shadow file is not present in container images
controls.description: Shadow file should not be present in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove shadow file from container images.

controls.title: Ensure 'root' password is not set in container images
controls.description: Root password should not be set in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove root password from container images.

controls.title: Ensure 'root' user account is empty
controls.description: Root user account should be properly secured.
controls.remediation: Secure root user account in containers.

controls.title: Ensure 'ENTRYPOINT' or 'CMD' is included in container images
controls.description: Container images should have ENTRYPOINT or CMD.
controls.remediation: Add ENTRYPOINT or CMD to Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'onbuild' instructions are not used in container images
controls.description: Avoid using ONBUILD instructions in container images.
controls.remediation: Remove ONBUILD instructions from Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'verify' command is used during image build
controls.description: Verify image integrity during build process.
controls.remediation: Add verification steps to Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'WORKDIR' instruction is used in container images
controls.description: Use WORKDIR instruction to set working directory.
controls.remediation: Add WORKDIR instruction to Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'USER' instruction is used in container images
controls.description: Use USER instruction to set non-root user.
controls.remediation: Add USER instruction to Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'VERIFY' command is used during image build
controls.description: Verify image integrity during build.
controls.remediation: Add verification steps to build process.

controls.title: Ensure 'ARG' instruction is used for secrets
controls.description: Use ARG instruction for secrets in Dockerfile.
controls.remediation: Use ARG for secrets in Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure 'VOLUME' instruction is used for data persistence
controls.description: Use VOLUME instruction for data persistence.
controls.remediation: Add VOLUME instruction to Dockerfile.

controls.title: Ensure container runtime is configured appropriately
controls.description: Container runtime should be properly configured.
controls.remediation: Configure container runtime settings.

controls.title: Ensure container runtime socket is protected
controls.description: Container runtime socket should have proper permissions.
controls.remediation: Set appropriate permissions on runtime socket.
